entry.title: New: Bill 6 (2026) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, INCREASING ESTIMATED REVENUES, CARRYOVER/SAVINGS, GENERAL FUND, BY $162,500, DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN CONCERNS, HUMAN CONCERNS PROGRAM, GRANTS AND DISBURSEMENTS FOR HEALTH, HUMAN SERVICES, AND EDUCATION, INCREASE THE APPROPRIATION FOR HOUSELESS PROGRAMS IN THE AMOUNTY OF $162,500"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
